asset.Name: The Unification War
asset.Description: A mod attempting to extensively rebalance the game while also tweaking the story to make the outcomes depicted in the final cutscene seem a little less sudden. Expect a very different tactical experience, hacked and salvaged alien hardware, recruitable defectors, and possibly more! (... You know, in a later version that actually follows through on any of my plans.)
asset.Author: DaloLorn
